sys_metadata_link.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_portal_preferences"> <sys_portal_preferences action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <name>title</name> <portal_section display_value="Created 2014-01-18 23:08:00">c30ddaaed7121100b9a5c7400e61033a</portal_section> <sys_created_by>jared.laethem</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2014-01-19 07:08:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>070ddaaed7121100b9a5c7400e61033a</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>jared.laethem</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2014-01-19 07:08:00</sys_updated_on> <value>&lt;a onmousedown='Event.stop(event); return false;' class='category_title_link' href='com.glideapp.servicecatalog_category_view.do?v=1&sysparm_parent=03f38475d7021100b9a5c7400e6103af&sysparm_catalog=0b22fd2ad7021100b9a5c7400e610319&sysparm_catalog_view=catalog_Admin_Home'&gt;User Interface&lt;/a&gt;</value> </sys_portal_preferences> </record_update>
